summary: Iteration 134 - All 7 new features tested. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly. Job Queue, Character CRUD, Analytics endpoints, Presigned R2 URLs, Video styles/templates/pricing all working. WebSocket endpoint exists but may have connection issues in preview environment.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before being established - may be preview environment/Kubernetes ingress issue

ui_bugs.issue: Nested button HTML warning - button inside button

action_items: WebSocket connection failing in preview - may need to verify Kubernetes ingress WebSocket configuration
Fix nested button HTML issue in CharacterConsistencyStudio.js - Button component inside character card button
critical_code_review_comments: Job Queue service uses in-memory queue with 4 workers - working correctly
Character CRUD endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Analytics Dashboard requires admin role (403 for regular users) - correct behavior
Presigned URL generation for R2 direct upload is working
Video styles (6), templates (8), and pricing info endpoints all return correct data
WebSocket hook uses correct /api/ws/progress path with authentication token

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, minor HTML validation warning)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed characters during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) All 7 new features verified working via API. 2) Job Queue: /api/jobs/my-jobs returns empty array for user with no jobs. 3) Character CRUD: create/list/get/delete all working. 4) Analytics Dashboard requires admin role. 5) Presigned R2 URL generation working. 6) WebSocket endpoint defined at /api/ws/progress but connection fails in preview environment. 7) Story Video Studio UI shows 'Live' status indicator despite WebSocket connection errors.
